titles.title: We Have Come into His House

authors.author: Bruce Ballinger
Bruce Ballinger
Lasst uns treten vor den Herrn

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We have come into His house Gathered in His name to worship Him, We have come into His house Gathered in His name to worship Him, We have come into His house Gathered in His name to worship Christ, the Lord Worship Him, Jesus Christ, the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let’s forget about ourselves Concentrate on Him and worship Him, Let’s forget about ourselves Concentrate on Him and worship Him, Let’s forget about ourselves Concentrate on Him and worship Christ, the Lord Worship Him, Jesus Christ, the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let us lift up holy hands Magnify His Name and worship Him, Let us lift up holy hands Magnify His Name and worship Him, Let us lift up holy hands Magnify His Name and worship Christ, the Lord Worship Him, Jesus Christ, the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is all my righteousness I stand complete in Him and worship Him, He is all my righteousness I stand complete in Him and worship Him, He is all my righteousness I stand complete in Him and worship Christ, the Lord Worship Him, Jesus Christ, the Lord.
